issues.title: Initial State of Codebase
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body:
This issue documents the initial state of the FocusWatch codebase prior to our refactoring efforts for the DSaaP project. It serves as a baseline to measure our architectural and testing improvements.

Currently, the application suffers from multiple architectural bottlenecks. 

The WritingExerciseManager.swift acts as a God Class, spanning roughly 700 lines and mixing timer logic, motion detection, haptics, data upload, and state logging. Similarly, DataStorageManager.swift handles multiple unrelated responsibilities including Google Drive uploads, webhook communications, binary encoding, and retry logic over 600 lines. As this is legacy code that was quickly copied and pasted into the project months ago, we now must address the accumulated technical debt and split it up according to the rest of the project's structure.

Hardcoded values and raw UserDefaults keys are scattered throughout the codebase rather than being centralized.

The application heavily overuses the Singleton pattern. Instances like AuthManager.shared, LevelService.shared, and ChecklistSyncService.shared make unit testing very difficult due to their tight coupling. 

Concurrency is handled inconsistently, with a mix of DispatchQueue.main.async and async/await throughout the synchronization services. The entire synchronization layer itself has become a tangled system, which must be simplified, properly separated, and transitioned to use deterministic messaging. Establishing the companion app as the main source of truth will solve the current issues with local synchronization getting out of hand.

The repository also overuses the singleton pattern, we think its a good idea to re-evaluate for each part what pattern is the most optimal for the scenario.

Testing coverage is so far non-existent. The goal is to build a comprehensive suite of unit tests and some UI tests.

issues.title: Overhaul the Synchronisation System
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: Remove hardcoded singletons in the sync layer to allow mocking of ConnectivityTransport during unit testing.

issues.title: Centralize Magic Strings and Layout Constants in Constants
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: Make sure the constants are all within AppConstants.

issues.title: Rework and Refactor the watch "Writing" microapplication
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body:
- Implement configuration flow between watch and phone 
- Encapsulate logic factored out from the god-object "WritingManager"
- Prepare for the W.I.P ML Model used for classification
- Remove unused functionality
- Remove configurations being stored and fetched in google drive
- Split Base64 packing and google drive upload so the upload provider can be exchanged in the future
- Allow configurations of EMA model parameters to be done in companion app
- Add a switcher between EMA and ML Mode on watch app

comments.body: Update: Task has been moved to TM2

issues.title: Integration Tests and Documentation for Telemetry
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: Automated tests for AppLogger to verify that view lifecycle events and telemetry data correctly format and POST to the Supabase app_logs table.

issues.title: Messy navigation interface on the watch
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body:
- Reduce number of clicks needed
- Group items in a more child friendly way
- Integrate Icons and more colors
- Enhance UX writing and localization
- Move from tabbed view to list view

comments.body: Design thinking workshop has yielded nice results

issues.title: Implement historical progression charts

issues.body: Expand the LevelView dashboard to visualize ActivityStats over time using Swift Charts.

issues.title: Integrate native EventKit permissions and fix the unreliability of long-term event reminders
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body:
Update CalendarViewModel to gracefully request and handle native iOS calendar permissions alongside internal App notifications.
Rework data transimission of events between the devices and simplify current implementation.
If possible, write tests.

issues.title: Current image transfer logic is not very robust
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: Implement Resumable Image File Transfers -> detect and automatically resume interrupted .jpg checklist file transfers via WCSessionFileTransfer.

issues.title: Combine Pomodoro-like micro applications
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: Merge the two pomodor-using micro applications "Writing" and "Pomodoro", investigate if more micro applications could benefit from a pomodoro mode or even globalize it.

comments.body: Design thinking workshop has yielded some nice ideas

issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: God-object on watch side which mixes UI state with sync logic

comments.body: Replace with a SyncCoordinator which Orchestrates outbound syncs and routes inbound messages without domain logic.

issues.title: Critical Notification Service
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: Current notifications are handled with normal priority, resulting in no trigger in certain scenarios. A solution would be to use "high-priority" notifications.

issues.title: Store Supabase auth tokens in Keychain instead of UserDefaults
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: Supabase access and refresh tokens should not be persisted in UserDefaults. Move session token storage to KeychainAccess, keep only non-sensitive preferences in defaults, and make sure login/logout flows still restore and clear sessions correctly.

issues.title: Move large persisted app data out of UserDefaults
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: ChecklistData, gallery metadata, milestones, and similar structured payloads are too large and relational for UserDefaults. Migrate these stores to SwiftData or file-based Codable persistence, and centralize the remaining defaults keys in AppConstants.StorageKeys.

issues.title: Load gallery images asynchronously with caching
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: GalleryItem image access should not synchronously read JPEGs from disk on the main thread. Add an async image loader with caching so gallery and checklist screens stay responsive during scrolling and rendering.

issues.title: Standardize sync and app flow concurrency on async/await
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: The codebase mixes Combine, DispatchQueue, and Swift Concurrency in the same sync paths. Refactor the coordinator/services layer toward async/await, reduce DispatchQueue usage where possible, and wrap WCSession operations in async-friendly APIs.

issues.title: Replace core singletons with injected dependencies
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: AuthManager, AppsManager, TelemetryManager, ChecklistDataStore, LevelService, and related managers are too tightly coupled through .shared access. Introduce dependency injection and environment-based wiring so views and view models can be tested with mocks.

issues.title: Reuse a single SwiftData container and model context
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: The app should not create multiple ModelContainer instances for the same store. Consolidate SwiftData setup behind one shared container/context provider and inject it into services that currently build their own container.

issues.title: Make Pomodoro timers drift-free
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: Pomodoro countdowns should be based on a target Date instead of repeated Task.sleep ticks. Recompute remaining time from the deadline so long-running timers do not drift over the session.

issues.title: Centralize storage keys and remove hardcoded defaults strings
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: Several UserDefaults keys are currently hardcoded in multiple places. Move the remaining storage key strings into AppConstants.StorageKeys so persistence code stays consistent and easier to refactor.

issues.title: Modernize gallery image downscaling
issues.author: salernoelia
issues.body: GalleryStorage currently uses older image-context APIs for resizing. Replace them with UIGraphicsImageRenderer or ImageIO thumbnail generation to reduce memory pressure and improve watch-side stability.

pull_requests.body: Enhance the structure and clarity of sync handling by introducing new classes and improving existing ones. This includes better management of connectivity, message routing, and validation logic.

comments.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer
comments.body: WatchApp creates its own SyncCoordinator instance but other code references SyncCoordinator.shared; risk of two coordinators and duplicated subscriptions. Suggest unify lifecycle (shared or injected).

comments.author: salernoelia
comments.body: @copilot apply changes based on this feedback

comments.author: copilot-swe-agent
comments.body: Fixed in e836a57: WatchApp + CompanionApp use SyncCoordinator.shared as StateObject. Also SyncStateManager.shared uses UserDefaults-backed store for persistence.

comments.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer
comments.body: SyncCoordinator has static shared while app also instantiates SyncCoordinator; risk duplicate WCSession observers. Suggest remove singleton or use singleton everywhere.

comments.author: salernoelia
comments.body: @copilot apply changes based on this feedback

comments.author: copilot-swe-agent
comments.body: Addressed: app uses SyncCoordinator.shared; no second instance is created. Singleton becomes single source of truth.

comments.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer
comments.body: CompanionApp constructs new SyncCoordinator even though shared exists; risk multiple coordinators. Suggest use shared as StateObject.

comments.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer
comments.body: SyncStateManager.shared init leaves store nil, disabling persistence; suggest default to UserDefaults-backed store.

comments.author: salernoelia
comments.body: @copilot apply changes based on this feedback

comments.author: copilot-swe-agent
comments.body: Fixed: SyncStateManager.shared uses UserDefaultsSyncSessionStateStore() to restore persistence.

comments.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer
comments.body: New localization keys are empty (missing localizations blocks); could break localization build. Add base localizations or remove keys.

comments.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer
comments.body: Key added without localizations; may cause build/runtime issues. Populate localizations or remove.

pull_requests.title: 12 rework and refactor the watch writing microapplication

issue_comments.body: @copilot resolve the merge conflicts in this pull request, use the main branch as the source of truth for the project files

> @copilot resolve the merge conflicts in this pull request, use the main branch as the source of truth for the project files

Resolved the merge conflicts in commit `0d33d7d`. The conflicts were in `project.pbxproj`, `companion.xcscheme`, and `watch.xcscheme` — all `.xcodeproj` files where main's version was accepted as the source of truth.
